name: HomeBox
author: sysadminsmedia & hay-kot
description: Homebox is the inventory and organization system built for the Home User

form_fields.label: Allow Users Registration
form_fields.hint: Allow users to register themselves

form_fields.label: Max Upload Size (MB)
form_fields.hint: Maximum file upload size supported in MB

form_fields.label: Log Level
form_fields.hint: Log level (trace, debug, info, warn, error, fatal, panic)

form_fields.label: Log Format
form_fields.hint: Log format to use (text or json)

form_fields.label: Auto Increment Asset ID
form_fields.hint: Auto-increment the asset_id field for new items

form_fields.label: Allow Analytics
form_fields.hint: Allow the Homebox team to view basic system information

form_fields.label: GitHub Release Check
form_fields.hint: Check for new GitHub releases on startup

form_fields.label: Trust Proxy
form_fields.hint: Trust proxy headers for determining request scheme (X-Forwarded-Proto)

form_fields.label: Hostname Override
form_fields.hint: Override hostname used for OIDC redirect URLs and other absolute URLs

form_fields.label: Currency Config Path
form_fields.hint: Path to JSON configuration file containing additional currencies

form_fields.label: Mailer Host
form_fields.hint: SMTP email host (leave empty to disable email notifications)

form_fields.label: Mailer Port
form_fields.hint: SMTP email port

form_fields.label: Mailer Username
form_fields.hint: SMTP email username

form_fields.label: Mailer Password
form_fields.hint: SMTP email password

form_fields.label: Mailer From Address
form_fields.hint: Email from address (e.g., noreply@example.com)

form_fields.label: Enable OIDC
form_fields.hint: Enable OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication

form_fields.label: OIDC Issuer URL
form_fields.hint: OIDC provider issuer URL (required when OIDC is enabled)

form_fields.label: OIDC Client ID
form_fields.hint: OIDC client ID (required when OIDC is enabled)

form_fields.label: OIDC Client Secret
form_fields.hint: OIDC client secret (required when OIDC is enabled)

form_fields.label: OIDC Scopes
form_fields.hint: OIDC scopes to request from the provider

form_fields.label: OIDC Allowed Groups
form_fields.hint: Comma-separated list of groups allowed to login (empty = all groups)

form_fields.label: OIDC Auto Redirect
form_fields.hint: Automatically redirect to OIDC provider login page

form_fields.label: OIDC Verify Email
form_fields.hint: Require email verification from OIDC provider

form_fields.label: OIDC Group Claim
form_fields.hint: Name of the claim in the ID token that contains user groups

form_fields.label: OIDC Email Claim
form_fields.hint: Name of the claim in the ID token that contains user email

form_fields.label: OIDC Name Claim
form_fields.hint: Name of the claim in the ID token that contains user display name

form_fields.label: OIDC Email Verified Claim
form_fields.hint: Name of the claim for email verification status

form_fields.label: OIDC Button Text
form_fields.hint: Text displayed on the OIDC login button

form_fields.label: Allow Local Login
form_fields.hint: Allow users to login with username/password when OIDC is enabled

form_fields.label: Enable Thumbnails
form_fields.hint: Enable thumbnail generation for images (PNG, JPEG, AVIF, WEBP, GIF)

form_fields.label: Thumbnail Width
form_fields.hint: Width for generated thumbnails in pixels

form_fields.label: Thumbnail Height
form_fields.hint: Height for generated thumbnails in pixels

form_fields.label: Barcode API Token
form_fields.hint: API token for BarcodeSpider.com service for barcode product lookups
